description: This Dart source file defines a Flutter widget named OceanBackground, which provides a styled background with a gradient used in the UI of an application. The widget wraps its child with a decorated Container that uses a gradient derived from theme colors.

classes.name: OceanBackground
classes.description: A Flutter StatelessWidget that creates a background with a linear gradient, based on theme colors, and contains a child widget.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree, returning a Container with a gradient decoration and the child widget.
